creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
After playing around, I find out that the files causing the problem are 
.m4a files from iTunes.  I can successfully play these files with 
mplayer, but when I try to use either totem or rhythmbox, it causes the 
program to crash.  I suspect this is a gstreamer problem, but I have 
specifically rebuilt both faad2 and gstreamer-plugins-faad, so I think I 
did that problem correctly.

What elee will cause some applications to fail with .m4a files, whereas 
mplayer can deal with it with no problems?

/Joe
